temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) In a dimly lit, dark setting, a man with glasses and a white collared shirt speaks to another man with long hair. The man with glasses is in profile, while the man with long hair is seen from the front, his face partially obscured by shadow. (Storyline: This brief, tense shot establishes a conversation between two characters in a dark, possibly clandestine, setting.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum begins to build.)
(00:02-00:05) A wide shot reveals a rainy, wet city square at night. The ground is slick with puddles reflecting the bright lights from the surrounding modern skyscrapers. Several people are gathered around two cars, and the Mandarin Oriental hotel is clearly visible in the background. (Storyline: This establishing shot sets the scene, indicating a modern, urban, and potentially dangerous location. The rain and dark atmosphere create a noir-like mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous hum continues, punctuated by the deep, resonant tolling of a large bell.)
